channel.title: Pages on Kevin McKee
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on Kevin McKee

item.title: About me
item.author: kmckee90@gmail.com (Kevin McKee)
item.description: I live in Nelson County, VA on the side of a mountain with my wife, Linnea, a cat, and a dog. In my free time I do things with the surrounding land like clearing hiking trails, hunting for edible mushrooms, and stargazing. Job title: Postdoctoral Associate Department of Statistics Center for Biostatistics and Health Data Science Virginia Tech Curriculum Vitae

item.title: Links

item.description: Google Scholar page github repositories for various projects OSF page for supplemental materials of published projects Old art website Old blog serving as my notebook for philosophy, math, statistics, and cognitive science study

item.title: Publications
item.author: kmckee90@gmail.com (Kevin McKee)
item.description: McKee, K. L., (2021) Hierarchical Biometrical Genetic Analysis of Dynamics. Behavior Genetics (in press) McKee, K. L., Crandell, I. C., Hanlon, A. L. (2020) US County-Level Social Distancing and Policy Impact: A Dynamical Systems Model. Journal of Medical Internet Research McKee, K. L., Russell, M., Mennis, J., Mason, M., & Neale, M. C. (2019). Emotion Regulation Dynamics Predict Substance Use in High-Risk Adolescents. Addictive Behaviors McKee, K. L., & Neale, M.
